ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Continued To Oct-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for and with Demetrius Williams and Roland Williams (petitioners).

Mrs. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she initially did not know about the fire, that a lot of the decedent's belongings had to be moved to storage because of the fire, that it is possible that some documents got destroyed in the fire, but they just don't know and that they do have the certificate of trust. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The undated lost will is admitted to probate. Demetrius Williams is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for October 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
